action.reasoning: Observation: ViT-B/16+GCE 8 epochs got 0.7477, worse than ConvNeXt-Tiny baseline 0.7743 (3 epochs CE). Analysis: Likely GCE/longer training memorized noise. ConvNeXt-Tiny at 160px with simple CE for 3 epochs is strong baseline. To improve: (1) keep ConvNeXt but use stronger settings - higher resolution 224, more epochs but with early stopping and label smoothing, (2) use mixup which is noise-robust regularizer, (3) try ConvNeXt with cosine schedule. The best.pt got overwritten so I lost the 0.7743 checkpoint. Need to retrain ConvNeXt baseline first to recover, then improve. Decision: Retrain ConvNeXt-Tiny at 224px with label smoothing + mixup for 5 epochs. Should beat baseline.
